sanskrit:
सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये रथं स्थापय मेऽच्युत।
यावदेतान्निरीक्षेऽहं योद्धुकामानवस्थितान्॥
transliteration:
senayor ubhayor madhye rathaṃ sthāpaya me ’cyuta |
yāvad etān nirīkṣe ’haṃ yoddhu-kāmān avasthitān ||
literal_meaning: Between both armies, O infallible one, station my chariot so that I may observe those positioned here desiring to fight.
contextual_meaning: Arjuna requests a strategic pause to visually map the battlefield and the relational stakes, signaling the first flicker of internal conflict before full-blown crisis.
psychological_state: Pre-contemplative scanning—hyper-vigilant data-gathering to reduce cognitive dissonance between duty and affection.
trigger_scenario: A manager asks HR to pull up the list of colleagues who will be laid off so she can 'see who exactly' before signing the final memo.
anchor_text: Pause, look around, and face what you're about to confront.
